title: Comprehensive Health Screen WGS Bundle
source: in-app browser logged-in sequencing.com order route __NEXT_DATA__.props.pageProps.orderData and rendered checkout summary extraction
bodyPreview: Logged-in order-route capture confirmed the Comprehensive Health Screen WGS Bundle product boundary, price, included products, and genetic analysis list. Account, shipping, and payment state were redacted.
summaryPreview: Comprehensive Health Screen WGS Bundle order metadata was available, but no package-specific formal report rows or completed report file were exposed.
bundleIncludes: Unlimited Access To Your Genetic Data
Privacy Forever Protection Of Your Data
visibleParagraphs: Unlimited Access To Your Genetic Data
Privacy Forever Protection Of Your Data
evidenceNotes: Order page was opened in the logged-in in-app browser and resolved to the authenticated purchase-kit route.
The page exposes pageProps.orderData for product and checkout metadata, but no completed report file was exposed.
The expanded Bundle Includes and Genetic Analysis Includes sections were read-only disclosure text.
No raw genome data, uploaded genome data, payment details, shipping address, account name, email address, private result URL, or account navigation text is included in this artifact.
Use order-route text only for product-boundary and bundle-composition context, not for local genetic, medical, medication, ancestry, fitness, or actionability conclusions.

requiredEvidenceForPromotion: Official Sequencing.com sample or completed bundle report output
Package-specific formal rows or lab/report fields
Row-level source bindings for the output rows
